facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this. A French bistro on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo that the resort crowd never finds. Aigue-Marine French Bistro by Hidden Gem. 4.8 stars across 305 reviews. That kind of consistency doesn't lie. Proper French cooking on a Vietnamese island. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
